name: Cyberhaven
description: Integrates with Cyberhaven Data Detection and Response API for data lineage tracking, incident investigation, policy management, and insider risk monitoring

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve data security incidents detected by Cyberhaven policies across cloud, web, email, removable storage, and Bluetooth channels

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for incident query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for incident query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by incident status (open, investigating, resolved, dismissed)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve full details of a specific incident including data lineage, user activity, and policy violation context

actions.name: List Data Events
actions.description: Retrieve data flow events showing file operations and data movement across endpoints and cloud services

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: eventType
parameters.description: Filter by event type (upload, download, copy, print, email_attach)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: Get Data Lineage
actions.description: Trace the full lineage of a data asset showing its origin, transformations, and movement across systems

parameters.name: dataId
parameters.description: Unique data asset identifier to trace lineage for

actions.name: List Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all data security policies configured in Cyberhaven

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Update incident status, assignee, or add investigation notes

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the incident to update

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: User to assign the incident to
